title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Siemens India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Siemens India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India Global Group in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
